content.full_text:
February 7, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
Box 807
Sacramento, Ca. 95804

Gentlemen:

The Mariposa Public Utility District provides fire protection, water and sewer services within specified boundaries in Mariposa County. The fire protection system is generally provided for in MPUD Ordinance #37 (copy attached). MPUD has the authority to operate a fire department under PUC Section 16463. To this date the Fire Chief and the fire fighters are volunteers.

Mr. Bill Bondshu was appointed by the MPUD Board of Directors to the position of Fire Chief (Fire Chief duties are specified in the attached Ordinance). Mr. Bondshu has proposed that the Fire Chief position be paid a salary of $300 per month as compensation for duties specified in the MPUD ordinance.

The MPUD Board of Directors took action at a special meeting held January 25, 1991 to pay such compensation provided that this is legal concerning applicable statutes with emphasis on the Political Reform Act. The Fire Chief would not have employee benefits as provided to existing employees, such as medical, dental, paid sick leave and vacation, etc.

Bill Bondshu’s normal occupation is as an employee of Bondshu Insurance Agency. Bill’s father is the owner of the firm. The Mariposa Public Utility District maintains liability and fidelity bond insurance policies through Bondshu Insurance. These policies cover the activities of all three MPUD services. The commission received by Bondshu Insurance relative to the MPUD insurance policies is in excess of $250 per year. Bill Bondshu has stated that his compensation from the agency is a flat salary only and not based upon commission from policies sold.

Would you please render a written opinion as the legality of Bill Bondshu’s status as a paid Fire Chief of the Mariposa Public Utility District. Thank you very much.

Sincerely,

Mark L. Rowney
General Manager
